sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n23326" key="daktulodo/xmh" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δακτῠλο-δόχμη</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n23326.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">four fingers' breadth,</tr_> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">παλαιστή</ref></xr>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:2:157" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.157</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
